name: Lillia

basic_attack.calculation_notes: Basic-attack timing values are sourced from From Online stats payload.

passive.name: Dream-Laden Bough
passive.description_source: Innate:  Lillia's abilities apply Dream Dust to enemies hit, which continually deals magic damage based on the target's maximum health over a short time, and  heals her for the same duration.

effects.description: Innate: Lillia's abilities apply Dream Dust to enemies hit, which deals[ 5% (+ 1.25% per 100 AP) of the target's maximum health total magic damage over 3 seconds, capped at 65 against monsters. ][ 0.83% (+ 0.2083% per 100 AP) of the target's maximum health magic damage every 0.5 seconds over 3 seconds, capped at 10.83 per tick against monsters. ]

Lillia heals herself for[ 39 (+ 9% AP) against large monsters and 6 : 103.17 (based on level) (+ 30% AP) against champions ][ 6.5 (+ 1.5% AP) against large monsters and 1 : 17.19 (based on level) (+ 5% AP) against champions every 0.5 seconds ]over the duration of Dream Dust, reduced to 15% effectiveness for each target afflicted beyond the first. She may only heal against 1 monster at a time.

passive.description: Innate: Lillia's abilities apply Dream Dust to enemies hit, which deals[ 5% (+ 1.25% per 100 AP) of the target's maximum health total magic damage over 3 seconds, capped at 65 against monsters. ][ 0.83% (+ 0.2083% per 100 AP) of the target's maximum health magic damage every 0.5 seconds over 3 seconds, capped at 10.83 per tick against monsters. ]
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Lilting Lullaby's application does not apply Dream Dust, but its triggering damage does.

basic_ability_1.name: Blooming Blows
basic_ability_1.description_source: Passive: Whenever  Lillia's  abilities hit at least one enemy, she generates a  stack of Prance, up to a cap.

effects.description: Passive: Whenever Lillia's abilities hit at least one enemy, she generates a stack of Prance for 6.5 seconds, refreshing on subsequent hits and stacking up to 4 times. Stacks expire one by one every 1.5 seconds when the duration ends.

effects.context_notes: Prance: For each stack, Lillia gains bonus movement speed.
Prance: For each stack, Lillia gains bonus movement speed.
Active: Lillia swings her censer around her, dealing magic damage to nearby enemies.
Active: Lillia swings her censer around her, dealing magic damage to nearby enemies.

effects.description: Lillia can move during Blooming Blows' cast time.

basic_ability_1.description: Passive: Whenever Lillia's abilities hit at least one enemy, she generates a stack of Prance for 6.5 seconds, refreshing on subsequent hits and stacking up to 4 times. Stacks expire one by one every 1.5 seconds when the duration ends.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Spell shield will not prevent Lillia from gaining a Prance stack.

basic_ability_2.name: Watch Out! Eep!
basic_ability_2.description_source: Active:  Lillia  dashes toward the target area and smashes her censer, dealing magic damage to enemies hit. Enemies hit within the epicenter are dealt  increased damage.

effects.context_notes: Active: Lillia dashes to 150 units in front of the target location over 0.759 seconds.
Active: Lillia dashes to 150 units in front of the target location over 0.759 seconds.

basic_ability_2.description: Active: Lillia dashes to 150 units in front of the target location over 0.759 seconds, though not through terrain, and deals magic damage in an area around the target spot. Enemies hit within the epicenter are dealt 200% increased damage.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Lillia dashes to her target location over 0.6 to 0.767 seconds, then resolves impact at 0.767 seconds.

basic_ability_3.name: Swirlseed
basic_ability_3.description_source: Active:  Lillia lobs a seed at the target area that rolls forward indefinitely. The seed detonates upon hitting an enemy or terrain, dealing magic damage to enemies in a cone,  slowing and  revealing them for a short time.

effects.context_notes: Active: Lillia lobs a seed at the target location that rolls forward indefinitely.

basic_ability_3.description: Active: Lillia lobs a seed at the target location that rolls forward indefinitely. The seed detonates upon hitting an enemy or terrain while on the ground, dealing magic damage to enemies in a cone, slowing them by 40% for 3 seconds and revealing them for 2 seconds.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Swirlseed's origin is determined from Lillia's position at the start of cast, the rolling direction is determined from Lillia's position at the end of cast (when the projectile is created, not when the seed starts rolling).

ultimate.name: Lilting Lullaby
ultimate.description_source: Active:  Lillia casts a magical lullaby over all enemy  champions affected by  Dream Dust, making them  drowsy before falling  asleep for a few seconds.

effects.description: Active: Lillia casts a magical lullaby over all enemy champions affected by Dream Dust, which arrives after 0.3 seconds and renders them drowsy for 1.5 seconds, slowing them by 10%. After the duration, they fall asleep for 2 seconds.

effects.context_notes: The next instance of non- persistent damage that a sleeping target takes from champions, large monsters or turrets consumes the debuff to deal additional magic damage.

effects.description: An enemy champion affected by Dream Dust is required to cast this ability. Lillia can move during Lilting Lullaby's cast time.

ultimate.description: Active: Lillia casts a magical lullaby over all enemy champions affected by Dream Dust, which arrives after 0.3 seconds and renders them drowsy for 1.5 seconds, slowing them by 10%. After the duration, they fall asleep for 2 seconds.
context_notes: Source notes (summary): Spell shield will not prevent falling asleep nor block the wake-up damage.

sources.used_for: canonical champion baseline generation for stats, abilities, and execution metadata

notes: Generated from From Online champion payload as part of champion corpus parity coverage.
Ability execution metadata is source-derived from castTime/speed/effectRadius when present.
This baseline should be manually refined for high-impact simulation nuances before runtime scripting expansion.

schema_notes.base_by_rank: Arrays indexed by ability rank (1-based in game, 0-based in data).
schema_notes.base_by_champion_level: Arrays indexed by champion level minus one.
schema_notes.formula: Formula objects use explicit op/terms/output_stat when reliable source math is available.
schema_notes.ratio_type: Common ratio types: total_ad, bonus_ad, ap, target_max_health, target_missing_health.
schema_notes.value_percent: Percent values are represented as whole percentages unless noted otherwise.
schema_notes.basic_attack: Basic attack timing and projectile defaults are source-derived with documented fallbacks.
schema_notes.basic_attack_raw_timing_stats: Raw timing stats preserve source payload fields for auditability.
